text:
0 =None
 1=One
 2=Two
 3= Three
^=Blank(skip pattern)
96 C0300A_RPT_CRCT_YR_CD C0300A_RPT_CRCT_YR_CD C0300A BIMS: Temporal Orientation - Able to Report Correct Year CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies how closely the resident knew the current year. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Missed by > 5 years or no answer
1=Missed by 2-5 years
2=Missed by 1 year
3=Correct
^=Blank(skip pattern)
97 C0300B_RPT_CRCT_MO_CD C0300B_RPT_CRCT_MO_CD C0300B BIMS: Temporal Orientation - Able to Report Correct
